game_info.title: Tiny Wings Clone
game_info.concept:
You have always dreamed of flying - but your wings are tiny. Luckily the world is full of beautiful hills. Use the hills as jumps - slide down, flap your wings and fly! At least for a moment - until this annoying gravity brings you back down to earth. But the next hill is waiting for you already. Watch out for the night and fly as fast as you can. Otherwise flying will only be a dream once again.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/tiny-wings/id417817520

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

You have always dreamed of flying - but your wings are tiny. Luckily the world is full of beautiful hills. Use the hills as jumps - slide down, flap your wings and fly! At least for a moment - until this annoying gravity brings you back down to earth. But the next hill is waiting for you already. Watch out for the night and fly as fast as you can. Otherwise flying will only be a dream once again.

Tiny Wings was chosen as the iPhone Game of the Year in App Store Rewind 2011 in Europe and many other countries. Thank you Apple and a big thank you to all Tiny Wings fans!

Highlights: 
• simple "one button" (ok... maybe "one tap") arcade game about the dream of flying 
• the world is changing every day - so it does in this game! Procedural generated graphics will make "tiny wings" look different every day you play
 • Four game modes
 • Daily mode with new islands and missions every day
 • 240 birds to unlock
 • Night mode: play the game at night 
• upgrade your nest by fulfilling tasks
• iPad only: Split screen multiplayer!
• Supports Game Center with 30 tricky achievements
• Supports iCloud syncronization
game_info.description:
You are a small bird with tiny wings who dreams of flying. The world is full of rolling hills. Use them to your advantage!
Press DOWN or SPACE to fold your wings and dive. Do this to slide down hills and gain immense speed. Release the key to open your wings and flap against gravity to soar through the sky.
Timing is everything: Dive on the down-slopes, glide on the up-slopes.
But beware! The night is chasing you. If you are too slow, the shadows will catch up, and your dream will end. Collect sun coins to push back the night!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Down / Space: Dive (Fold wings to slide downhill or drop fast in air)
- Release Key: Glide / Flap (Use on uphills or to fly)
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over)
- ESC: Pause / Resume
- Enter: Start Game

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Input Response Test. Verifies that the game accepts inputs and the player character responds by changing state (diving/gliding).
TEST_1.strategy_description: Alternates between holding the Dive key (Space) and releasing it every 60 frames. This confirms that the physics engine processes the 'heavy' state vs 'gliding' state correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The bird should visibly toggle between diving (fast fall/slide) and gliding. The game should not crash, and the score should increase as the bird moves forward.

TEST_2.test_description: Skill-based "Slope Surfing" Test. Tests the physics interaction with terrain slopes to maximize velocity.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The test analyzes the terrain slope at the player's position. It holds 'Dive' when the slope is downward (favorable for sliding) or the bird is high in the air, and releases on upward slopes to glide.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The bird should maintain high momentum, performing smooth slides and jumps. The score should accumulate rapidly, and the bird should stay ahead of the "Night" chaser for a significant duration.
